summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of getszy.com Phase 1 - AI-native e-commerce platform. Backend APIs 100% functional (35/35 tests passed). Frontend storefront, admin dashboard, and HERO FEATURE (AI Admin Chat) all working perfectly. Mobile responsiveness verified. Zero critical issues found.
passed_tests: Backend: Health endpoint returns ok
Backend: Categories endpoint returns 7 categories
Backend: Products endpoint returns 14 products with filtering (category, search, featured)
Backend: Auth signup creates customer and returns JWT
Backend: Auth login works for admin@getszy.com (admin role) and customer@getszy.com
Backend: Customer flow - cart add/get, checkout, order placement, order retrieval all working
Backend: Admin stats endpoint returns data with series_7d
Backend: Admin orders list and status update working
Backend: Admin customers endpoint working
Backend: Admin product CRUD (create, update, delete) working
Backend: Admin supplier CRUD working
Backend: AI Admin Chat - 8/8 commands passed (add_product, list_orders, show_stats, low_stock, add_supplier, list_products, reject, clarify)
Backend: AI Admin Chat sessions and history endpoints working
Frontend: Homepage loads with premium design, categories grid, trending section
Frontend: Category navigation works (Fashion category shows 3 products)
Frontend: Product detail page loads with Add to Cart button
Frontend: Auth protection - unauthenticated users redirected to /login when adding to cart
Frontend: Customer login successful with customer@getszy.com/Demo@123
Frontend: Add to cart working for logged-in users
Frontend: Cart page shows items with quantity controls, checkout button, cart badge updates
Frontend: Checkout page loads with shipping form and order summary
Frontend: Account page shows orders with correct status badges and tracking numbers
Frontend: Admin login redirects to /admin dashboard
Frontend: Admin dashboard shows KPI cards (Revenue, Orders, Customers, Low Stock)
Frontend: Admin dashboard shows revenue and orders charts for last 7 days
Frontend: Admin dashboard shows recent orders
Frontend: Admin products page loads with Add Product button and product table
Frontend: Admin orders page shows orders table with update functionality
Frontend: Admin suppliers page shows 5 suppliers with add/edit/delete options
Frontend: Admin customers page loads
Frontend: AI Admin Chat interface loads with suggestion chips and history sidebar
Frontend: AI Admin Chat sends commands and displays responses with result cards
Frontend: AI Admin Chat shows stats card with revenue/profit/orders data
Frontend: AI Admin Chat Hinglish responses working (e.g., 'Yeh raha iss mahine ka revenue stats!')
Frontend: AI-created products (Test Dress, TestUI Dress) appear on storefront
Mobile: Homepage renders correctly on 390x844 viewport
Mobile: Mobile menu (Sheet) opens with all categories
Mobile: Shop page shows product grid in 2 columns
Mobile: Admin dashboard renders with bottom tab navigation
